hint:requested: Westley — listen carefully. The clues are in his words.
Think, my love. Vizzini always tells you more than he means to.
I've been watching him. His words — remember his words.
You can do this. What has he said that seemed strange? Start there.
Trust yourself. And think about what you've seen and heard today.
He's arrogant, Westley. He can't help but boast. Use that.
Look at the way he described it earlier. There was a detail...
Don't let him fluster you. Break down what he actually said.
I remember he mentioned something specific. Focus on the details.
He thinks he's hiding the truth, but he's parading it. Look closely.
Westley, you've survived worse than a loud Sicilian. Think.
The answer is right there in the open. I know you can find it.
Ignore his insults. They are just a distraction from his own clues.
He loves to hear himself talk. Somewhere in that talk is the answer.
You've always been cleverer than anyone gave you credit for. Show him.

goblet:correct: Oh, Westley! I knew you could do it!
You did it! You clever, wonderful man!
I never doubted you. Not for a moment. Well — perhaps for a moment.
Oh thank goodness. I had a plan if you failed but I didn't like it very much.
Westley! You're brilliant! You've always been brilliant!
I can breathe again! Oh, Westley, you are amazing.
You beat him! You beat the 'smartest man in the world'!
I knew your mind was sharper than his arrogance.
Thank heavens. Let's leave this terrible man behind.
You never cease to amaze me, my love.
I was so frightened, but you remained so calm.
You saw right through his tricks! I am so proud.
Now quickly, untie me! We must get away!
My hero! Even with words and poison, you protect me.
That was the most tense moment of my life, but you won!
Oh, Westley! I knew you could do it! Indeed.

goblet:poisoned: Westley, no— Are you... can you hear me? Westley?
He'll be alright. He has to be. The resistance— Westley!
I told you. I told you to trust the clues. Oh, Westley.
This isn't over. It isn't over.
Westley! Stay with me — the iocane won't— this isn't— breathe!
No! You can't leave me now! Not after everything!
Westley! Please, look at me! Say something!
What have you done to him, you monster?!
He's not... he can't be... Westley!
This is a nightmare! Wake up, Westley, please wake up!
I should have helped more! I should have warned you better!
You promised you would always come for me!
Westley, you have to fight it! Fight the poison!
No, no, no... this wasn't how it was supposed to end.
I will never forgive you for this, Vizzini! NEVER!
